description: Application permissions that grant Global Administrator equivalence. These permissions allow an app to escalate privileges, assign roles, or modify any directory object — effectively equivalent to Global Administrator.

permissions.name: RoleManagement.ReadWrite.Directory
permissions.reason: Can assign any Entra ID role to any principal, including Global Administrator
permissions.attackAction: Assign Global Administrator role to itself or any user/app

permissions.name: AppRoleAssignment.ReadWrite.All
permissions.reason: Can grant itself or any app any application permission, including other dangerous ones
permissions.attackAction: Grant itself RoleManagement.ReadWrite.Directory, then assign Global Admin

permissions.name: Application.ReadWrite.All
permissions.reason: Can modify any app registration's credentials, then authenticate as that app and inherit its permissions
permissions.attackAction: Add secret to a high-privilege app, authenticate as it, use its permissions

permissions.name: Directory.ReadWrite.All
permissions.reason: Near-full write access to all directory objects including users, groups, apps, and service principals
permissions.attackAction: Modify group memberships, app owners, or other directory objects to gain indirect privilege

permissions.name: Directory.AccessAsUser.All
permissions.reason: Highest privileged delegated permission — grants full directory access as the signed-in user
permissions.attackAction: If user is a Global Admin, the app inherits full Global Admin access via delegation
